patches.rationale: MAJOR carry-forward (c1, c2, c3): relabels_standard is incorrectly TRUE for WIN-048 (CMB Axis of Evil). The dome is grabbing an unexplained anomaly to claim as counter-evidence, not renaming an existing standard-physics explanation. Anomaly hijacking is logically distinct from relabeling. Flip to FALSE to stop inflating Part 2b relabels count.

patches.find: the dome author has not included it in the monitoring suite
patches.replace: the only monitoring artifact for this value is a static live-power dashboard entry (Predicted: >2σ, Observed: 2.5σ, Tolerance: N/A) — a post-hoc threshold against a known result, not a fetch-and-compare monitor
patches.rationale: MODERATE: Current text technically true (no monitor.py entry) but a dome defender will point to the live power dashboard as their monitoring suite. The replacement is both accurate and pre-empts this retort by acknowledging the dashboard entry while explaining why it fails the post-hoc standard.

patches.replace: contradicting WIN-048's premise). A dome defender may retreat to claiming WIN-034 is metaphorical, but the dome model itself uses WIN-034 to provide the conductive ceiling required by WIN-029 Schumann claim — the firmament cannot be metaphorical for one purpose and physical for another.
patches.rationale: MODERATE: Pre-empt the easiest escape from the WIN-034 self-contradiction argument. A dome defender can claim WIN-034 is biblical metaphor, but the dome itself uses WIN-034 as a physical requirement for WIN-029. The pincer argument closes this retreat.

patches.find: a physical history with no analog in dome geometry.
patches.replace:
a physical history with no analog in dome geometry.

The anomalous quadrupole-octopole alignment correlates with the ecliptic plane (Schwarz et al. 2004, PRL 93, 221301) — Earth's orbital plane around the Sun. In dome geometry the ecliptic is not defined; the dome rejects the heliocentric frame that gives this alignment its name. Either the alignment is coincidental (eroding the dome's claimed significance) or it reflects a real physical link to the ecliptic (supporting heliocentrism, the model the dome opposes).
patches.rationale: MODERATE carry-forward from c2: The ecliptic alignment paradox is a strong dilemma argument against the dome. The CMB quadrupole-octopole anomaly correlates with Earth's orbital plane around the Sun — a frame that has no meaning in dome cosmology. Adding this closes a gap the curmudgeon flagged twice.

MINOR: Add DOI link for Land & Magueijo 2005 (10.1103/PhysRevLett.95.071301), the foundational paper for the Axis of Evil observation. Improves citation integrity; recommended by curmudgeon c2 and c3.
